case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC VS. RACHELLE BERGUNIO et al

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  APR-01-2014
DECLARATION RE: CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1033; INTEREST AND EVIDENCE CODE 1550 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE $4,845.69 PRINCIPAL, $249.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,094.69, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
DECLARATION RE; REDUCED FILING FEE & VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $1,935.22 INTEREST, $50.00 COSTS, (TRANSACTION ID # 17316011) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 10, INCL
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $249.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, (TRANSACTION ID # 63073454) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC SERVED OCT-13-2013, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
IN SUPPORT OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 585 FILED BY PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SACRAMENTO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BERGUNIO, RACHELLE
